title: Auto Repair Parts & Labor Quote Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for generating accurate repair quotes based on parts, labor, overhead, and profit margin, compliant with ISO 9001 and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Parts Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of replacement parts from supplier invoice.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of replacement parts from supplier invoice.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçi faturasından alınan yedek parçaların toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total des pièces de rechange selon la facture du fournisseur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de las piezas de repuesto según la factura del proveedor.

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Estimated technician hours based on standard repair times (e.g., Mitchell, ALLDATA).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated technician hours based on standard repair times (e.g., Mitchell, ALLDATA).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart onarım sürelerine (ör. Mitchell, ALLDATA) dayalı tahmini teknisyen saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Technikerstunden basierend auf Standardreparaturzeiten (z. B. Mitchell, ALLDATA).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures technicien estimées basées sur les temps de réparation standard (ex. Mitchell, ALLDATA).
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas estimadas de técnico basadas en tiempos de reparación estándar (ej. Mitchell, ALLDATA).

inputs.label: Labor Rate (USD/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Shop's hourly labor charge, typically includes overhead and profit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shop's hourly labor charge, typically includes overhead and profit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atölyenin saatlik işçilik ücreti, genellikle genel gider ve karı içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stündlicher Arbeitslohn der Werkstatt, beinhaltet in der Regel Gemeinkosten und Gewinn.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux horaire facturé par l'atelier, incluant généralement frais généraux et profit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo por hora de mano de obra del taller, generalmente incluye gastos generales y ganancia.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to shop overhead (rent, utilities, admin).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of direct costs allocated to shop overhead (rent, utilities, admin).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan maliyetlere tahsis edilen genel gider yüzdesi (kira, elektrik, idari).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der direkten Kosten, der auf Werkstattgemeinkosten entfällt (Miete, Nebenkosten, Verwaltung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des coûts directs alloué aux frais généraux de l'atelier (loyer, services publics, administration).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de costos directos asignados a gastos generales del taller (alquiler, servicios públicos, administración).

inputs.label: Target Profit Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on total job cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired profit margin on total job cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam iş maliyeti üzerinde istenen kar marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Gewinnmarge auf die gesamten Auftragskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge bénéficiaire souhaitée sur le coût total du travail.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de beneficio deseado sobre el costo total del trabajo.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage for the region.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas (%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax percentage for the region.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bölge için geçerli satış vergisi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe de vente applicable dans la région.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto a las ventas aplicable para la región.

inputs.label: Customer Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Optional discount offered to customer (e.g., loyalty, promotion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional discount offered to customer (e.g., loyalty, promotion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteriye sunulan isteğe bağlı indirim (ör. sadakat, promosyon).
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler Rabatt für den Kunden (z. B. Treue, Aktion).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Remise optionnelle offerte au client (ex. fidélité, promotion).
businessContext_i18n.es: Descuento opcional ofrecido al cliente (ej. fidelidad, promoción).

inputs.label: Parts Markup (%)
inputs.businessContext: Markup applied to parts cost to cover handling and profit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Markup applied to parts cost to cover handling and profit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parça maliyetine, taşıma ve karı karşılamak için uygulanan kâr marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufschlag auf die Teilekosten zur Deckung von Handhabung und Gewinn.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Majoration appliquée au coût des pièces pour couvrir la manutention et le profit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen aplicado al costo de las piezas para cubrir manejo y ganancia.

rules.message: For complex jobs, labor hours should be at least 0.5 hours.
Parts markup below 10% on high-cost parts may indicate pricing error.
Profit margin below 5% is below sustainable threshold (Lean Six Sigma).

thresholds.message: Labor cost is more than 70% of direct costs; verify efficiency.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
